Issues: The style is highly trend-based (vaporwave/neon typography), meaning its uniqueness relies heavily on the specific execution, which may become common in the market.
Print quality and resolution would need to be confirmed for high-resolution commercial use; scaling artifacts could be an issue if not delivered in vector format.
The aesthetic targets a specific niche (retro/synthwave), making it highly appealing to that audience but less broadly applicable than purely functional graphic design.
